business_ideas.idea: Media Cross: military recruitment firm with fixed government contracts and built-in profit margins
Pool service business: market-leading regional operator with high cash flow and recurring revenue

predictions.text: Small business acquisitions will outperform S&P 500 by significant margin when properly selected and operated.
Humble enduring businesses (pools, HVAC) will outperform tech due to less competition and predictable cash flows.
Most successful acquisition operators will be those humble enough to focus on team and culture over financial engineering.
